simple_types.name: Unsigned_16
simple_types.code:
type Unsigned_16 is mod 2 ** 16
  with Size => 16;

simple_types.name: Unsigned_32
simple_types.code:
type Unsigned_32 is mod 2 ** 32
  with Size => 32;

simple_types.name: Unsigned_8
simple_types.code:
type Unsigned_8 is mod 2 ** 8
  with Size => 8;

subprograms.name: Shift_Left
subprograms.code: function Shift_Left (Value : Unsigned_32; Positions : Natural) return Unsigned_32

subprograms.name: Shift_Right
subprograms.code: function Shift_Right (Value : Unsigned_32; Positions : Natural) return Unsigned_32
